title: viola lutea
intro: Viola lutea, also known as the yellow violet or yellow pansy, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Viola lutea include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Viola lutea is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
